songs.title: House of the Rising Sun
songs.body:
{Intro}
[Am] [C] [D] [F]
[Am] [E] [Am] [E]

{Verse 1}
There [Am]is a [C]house in [D]New Or-[F]leans
They [Am]call the [C]Rising [E]Sun [E]
And it's [Am]been the [C]ruin of [D]many a poor [F]boy
And [Am]God I [E]know I'm [Am]one [E]

songs.title: Knockin' on Heaven's Door
songs.body:
{Verse}
[G]Mama take this [D]badge off of [Am]me
[G]I can't use it [D]any-[C]more
[G]It's gettin' dark too [D]dark to [Am]see
[G]Feels like I'm [D]knockin' on heaven's [C]door

{Chorus}
[G]Knock knock knockin' on [D]heaven's [Am]door
[G]Knock knock knockin' on [D]heaven's [C]door

songs.title: Let It Be
songs.body:
{Verse}
When I [C]find myself in [G]times of trouble
[Am]Mother Mary [F]comes to me
[C]Speaking words of [G]wisdom let it [F]be [C]

{Chorus}
Let it [Am]be let it [G]be
Let it [F]be let it [C]be
[C]Whisper words of [G]wisdom let it [F]be [C]
